subtasks.title: Define strategy schema and policy engine
subtasks.details: Design strategy config model including universe, allowed sides, score thresholds, time filters, and risk limits.
questions: Will custom user-defined formulas be supported in v1?

subtasks.title: Generate recommendation payload
subtasks.details: Create recommendation payload with symbol, side, entry, target, stop loss, confidence, reason codes, and timestamp.
acceptance_criteria: Reason codes map to scoring factors.
questions: Should target/SL be absolute values or percent defaults by strategy?

subtasks.title: Persist recommendation lifecycle
subtasks.details: Store recommendation records with lifecycle state transitions and user-level tracking.
acceptance_criteria: State transitions validated by business rules.
questions: Need manual override status for admin edits?

subtasks.title: Expose recommendation APIs
subtasks.details: Provide endpoints for latest recommendations, history, and recommendation details by strategy/user.
acceptance_criteria: API filters by user, strategy, and segment.
